message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across btrfs, cli, core, harness, ondisk, repair, and tui crates

Automated rustfmt pass to normalize struct literal formatting, import
ordering, function call alignment, and expression wrapping across 7
crates. No behavioral changes — purely whitespace and line-break
adjustments to match the project's fmt configuration.

Key areas reformatted:
- ffs-btrfs: BtrfsKey/BtrfsStripe struct literals in tests, assert message alignment
- ffs-cli: println! column header alignment, context closure formatting
- ffs-core: integration test helper signatures, assert alignment
- ffs-harness: import ordering (std::sync), histogram bounds alignment
- ffs-ondisk: struct field formatting
- ffs-repair: expression wrapping
- ffs-tui: line wrapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
